'''竏嗜-ng-d-k''' ('''kanangdekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:myelinate|myelinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:myelinate|myelinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗜-ng-d-k
|-
! Lemma
| kanangdekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinangdekoko|thinangdekoko]] || [[word:jinangdekoko|jinangdekoko]] || [[word:shinangdekoko|shinangdekoko]] || [[word:kinangdekoko|kinangdekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunangdekoko|thuthunangdekoko]] || [[word:jujunangdekoko|jujunangdekoko]] || [[word:shushunangdekoko|shushunangdekoko]] || [[word:kukunangdekoko|kukunangdekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunangdekoko|thunangdekoko]] || [[word:junangdekoko|junangdekoko]] || [[word:shunangdekoko|shunangdekoko]] || [[word:kunangdekoko|kunangdekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonangdekoko|thonangdekoko]] || [[word:jonangdekoko|jonangdekoko]] || [[word:shonangdekoko|shonangdekoko]] || [[word:konangdekoko|konangdekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦnangdekoko|thﾃｦnangdekoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦnangdekoko|jﾃｦnangdekoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦnangdekoko|shﾃｦnangdekoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦnangdekoko|kﾃｦnangdekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanangdekoko|thathanangdekoko]] || [[word:jajanangdekoko|jajanangdekoko]] || [[word:shashanangdekoko|shashanangdekoko]] || [[word:kakanangdekoko|kakanangdekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanangdekoko|thanangdekoko]] || [[word:janangdekoko|janangdekoko]] || [[word:shanangdekoko|shanangdekoko]] || [[word:kanangdekoko|kanangdekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanangdekoko|thanangdekoko]] || [[word:janangdekoko|janangdekoko]] || [[word:shanangdekoko|shanangdekoko]] || [[word:kanangdekoko|kanangdekoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
